coordinate_conventions.airr_prediction_inputs: AIRR-style prediction starts are converted from 1-based by adapters

genairr_features.name: vdj_recombination
genairr_features.notes: Core record generation path for all benchmark cases.

genairr_features.name: s5f_mutation
genairr_features.notes: Benchmark can use rate or explicit count distributions through stratum params.

genairr_features.name: adaptive_anchor_amplicons
genairr_features.notes: Benchmark-side crop policy models FR/J anchored amplicons while preserving GenAIRR truth.

genairr_features.name: deterministic_orientation_transforms
genairr_features.notes: Orientation is applied after GenAIRR so canonical and presented truth are both retained.

genairr_features.name: strict_sampling
genairr_features.notes: Generation can request strict stream sampling; CI-level record validation remains planned.

genairr_features.name: segment_targeted_mutation
genairr_features.notes: Supported by the shared experiment builder; dedicated assay strata are still planned.

genairr_features.name: pcr_substitution_errors
genairr_features.notes: Supported by the shared experiment builder; dedicated PCR-error strata are still planned.

genairr_features.name: metadata_stamping
genairr_features.notes: Supported as a param pass-through; subject/cohort metadata recipes are still planned.

benchmark_surface: rare allele and missing allele strata
genairr_features.name: allele_restriction
genairr_features.notes: Builder pass-through exists; curated rare/missing-allele assay strata are still planned.

genairr_features.name: genotype_and_cohort_sampling
genairr_features.notes: Single-subject genotype strata are available; true run_cohort orchestration remains planned.

genairr_features.name: record_validation_gate
genairr_features.notes: Available for bounded generation/preflight; large streaming builds still default to zero-overhead streaming.

genairr_features.name: multi_locus_configs
genairr_features.notes: Per-DataConfig locus probes are available; unified cross-locus reporting remains planned.

specs.description: Broad GenAIRR human IGH benchmark for end-to-end alignment tools.
specs.name: human_igh_ogrdb_broad

strata.description: Near-naive full-length reads with minimal corruption.
strata.name: clean_full

strata.description: FR1 5'-primer amplicon (~120bp; V 5' retained, D/J trimmed off).
strata.name: amplicon_fr1

strata.description: 3'/J-primer amplicon (~120bp; D + J retained, V trimmed).
strata.name: amplicon_janchor

strata.description: High SHM stress, full reads retained.
strata.name: high_shm

strata.description: Clean records cycled through all four orientation transforms.
strata.name: orientation

measurement_scenarios.name: airr_contract_baseline
measurement_scenarios.notes: Baseline records make output-contract failures visible before stress slices are interpreted.

controlled_variables: canonical GenAIRR truth retained separately from presented truth
measurement_scenarios.name: coordinate_and_orientation

controlled_variables: allele truth derived from the same GenAIRR record used for labels
measurement_scenarios.name: segmentation_and_boundaries

controlled_variables: short-read windows are junction-centered unless explicitly adaptive-anchored
measurement_scenarios.name: junction_and_np_recovery

measurement_scenarios.controlled_variables: single-variable extreme strata isolate each edit-state driver
measurement_scenarios.name: edit_state_labels

measurement_scenarios.controlled_variables: SHM/noise/indels controlled in focused end-loss and paired-end strata
measurement_scenarios.name: end_loss_and_layout

measurement_scenarios.controlled_variables: GenAIRR full truth retained so scoring can distinguish model error from unobservability
isolated_variables: observable evidence loss from adaptive-style amplicons
measurement_scenarios.name: adaptive_fragment_observability

measurement_scenarios.controlled_variables: all receptor-specific corruption is irrelevant after contaminant replacement
measurement_scenarios.name: contaminant_handling

measurement_scenarios.controlled_variables: productive-only positive control plus coverage-accepted negative classes
measurement_scenarios.name: productivity_and_frame
measurement_scenarios.notes: GenAIRR has a productive-only constraint; nonproductive subclasses are isolated by coverage acceptance.

measurement_scenarios.controlled_variables: coverage planning can require per-reference allele and allele/context counts
isolated_variables: truth allele identity and candidate recall
measurement_scenarios.name: allele_coverage_and_candidates

measurement_scenarios.controlled_variables: current default GenAIRR IGH records often lack C calls; readiness reports this explicitly
measurement_scenarios.name: constant_region

measurement_scenarios.controlled_variables: same scoring contract across IGH/IGK/IGL/TCR configs
measurement_scenarios.name: multi_locus_chain

measurement_scenarios.controlled_variables: same query distribution across full-reference and restricted-genotype runs
isolated_variables: candidate genotype size and cohort-specific allele support
measurement_scenarios.name: genotype_masked_inference

checks.message: Total generated cases should be large enough to stabilize aggregate metrics.
checks.name: case_count

checks.message: Each generated stratum should have enough cases for sliced metrics.
checks.name: stratum_counts

checks.message: Required orientation transforms should be represented.
checks.name: orientation_counts

checks.message: Core biological/stress contexts should be covered before model comparison.
checks.name: required_context_counts

details.note: Per-gene thresholds are capped by the reference allele count when a reference set is supplied.

checks.message: Each gene class should cover enough distinct GenAIRR truth alleles.
checks.name: observed_allele_counts

checks.message: Observed truth alleles should cover a meaningful fraction of the DataConfig reference set.
checks.name: reference_allele_fraction

thresholds.description: Professional preflight profile before comparing alignment models.
